metadata.title: Blake Mycoskie Interview on TOMS Shoes Story & Business Model for Social Responsibility

transcript_read.speaker_mix_notes: Primarily Blake, occasional background noise, steady pace

voice_primitives.description: Frequent repetitions and filler words like 'uh', 'you know', 'so', indicating thinking out loud.

evidence_quotes: it's like if I can afford to buy a pair of shoes
